metadata.reference: D. Franta, D. Nečas, A. Giglia, P. Franta, I. Ohlídal. Universal dispersion model for characterization of optical thin films over wide spectral range: Application to magnesium fluoride. Appl. Surf. Sci. 421, 424–429 (2017) (Numerical data kindly provided by Daniel Franta)
metadata.comments: Film MgF<sub>2</sub>; Deposited by e-beam evaporation on c-Si; 134.2 nm thick film with an polycrystalline structure; Heterogenous data processing combining ellipsometric and spectrophotometric measurements; Room temperature.
